tasks.subject: Task 1: ParseCue head-sniff rejects non-cue input
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ParseCue reads at most 4 KiB before deciding whether the input looks like a cuesheet. Inputs lacking any cue keyword in that window get a sentinel error; valid cuesheets parse exactly as before.

**Files:**
- Modify: cue.go (add sentinel errNotACuesheet, modify ParseCue body before the bufio.NewScanner call)
- Modify: cue_test.go (add TestParseCueRejectsNonCueInput, TestParseCueRejectsRandomBinaryProperty)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ParseCue(strings.NewReader(<binary 8 KiB>)) returns error containing "does not look like a cuesheet"
- The error wraps errNotACuesheet (errors.Is true)
- All existing TestParseCueAccepts and TestResolveCue cases still pass
- testing/quick property test of 50+ random binary inputs returns the sentinel without panicking
- 4 GB hostile input returns within milliseconds (bounded by 4 KiB read)

**Verify:** go test -run 'TestParseCue|TestResolveCue' -v ./...

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cue.go", "cue_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -run 'TestParseCue|TestResolveCue' -v ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ParseCue rejects 8 KiB of 0xFF with sentinel", "errors.Is(err, errNotACuesheet) is true", "existing cue tests pass", "property test passes 50 seeds without panic", "4 GB hostile input returns in <1s"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: quietReporter surfaces failures
tasks.description:
**Goal:** --quiet silences progress (Step.Done, Info, Warn) but keeps failures (Step.Fail) visible on stderr.

**Files:**
- Modify: reporter.go (quietReporter becomes stateful, quietStep.Fail writes)
- Modify: reporter_test.go (replace TestReporterQuietProducesNoOutput with TestQuietReporterEmitsFailures + TestQuietReporterSilencesProgress)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- NewReporter(w, true) writes nothing on Step.Done, Info, Warn
- On Step.Fail, writes a single line containing label + error to w
- No call sites in main.go change
- go test ./... passes

**Verify:** go test -run TestReporter -v ./...

```json:metadata
{"files": ["reporter.go", "reporter_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -run TestReporter -v ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TestQuietReporterEmitsFailures passes", "TestQuietReporterSilencesProgress passes", "no main.go changes", "full go test ./... passes"]}
```
